extractedSignals.title: Apple
sourceText: Join us online June 8–12.
Add to calendar iPhone 17 Pro All out Pro.
Learn more Buy iPhone 17 Magichromatic.
Learn more Buy Apple for College Mac and iPad.
Learn more MacBook Air Now supercharged by M5.
Learn more Buy iPad Air Now supercharged by M4.
Learn more Buy Apple Watch Series 11 The ultimate way to watch your health.
Learn more Buy Apple Card Special new Apple Card and AirPods Pro 3 offer.
Limitations and spend requirements apply.
1 Learn more Apple Trade In Get up to $195–$695 in credit when you trade in iPhone 13 or higher.
2 Get your estimate Endless entertainment.
Stream now Drama A boy takes the trip of a lifetime in John Travolta’s directorial debut.
F1 on Apple TV Every Grand Prix™, live and on demand—all in one place, all year long.
Stream now Thriller A soccer mom falls down a rabbit hole of blackmail and murder.
MLS on Apple TV Watch every club, every match, live—all season long.
Stream now Comedy Everyone’s got a side hustle.
See the schedule Live MLB games, every Friday.
Stream now Mystery Welcome to the island, please enjoy your stay.
Just don’t ask too many questions.
Stream now Drama Is it a crime to want more?
The cost of AirPods Pro 3, for purposes of this offer, does not include applicable taxes, fees, or other charges.
AirPods Pro 3 purchases must be made directly from Apple (online or in an Apple Store) using the new Apple Card.
The qualifying AirPods Pro 3 purchase cannot be made entirely with an Apple Gift Card or Apple Account balance.
The AirPods Pro 3 purchase does not count toward the ten (10) Qualifying Purchases required in any month during Offer Period.
Returning the qualifying AirPods Pro 3 purchase may result in forfeiture of eligibility for this offer.
Offer not available to Apple Card Family members added to, or merged with, an Apple Card account during the Offer Period.
Qualifying Purchases can only be made by the new Apple Card account owner who opens a new Apple Card account during the Qualifying Period.
New Apple Card account owner does not include Co-Owners or Participants added to an Apple Card Family during the Offer Period.
This means purchases made by Apple Card Family members will not be included toward the new Apple Card account owner’s Qualifying Purchases.
Limit one offer per new Apple Card account.
This offer can be combined with other Apple Card promotional offers during the Qualifying Period and the Offer Period.
$25 Bonus Daily Cash is earned and transferred after the tenth purchase transaction is completed each month during the Offer Period.
In that case, that combined transaction will only count as one single purchase transaction in a given month for the applicable Offer Period.
You can choose to direct Daily Cash to a Savings account or to an Apple Cash account.
If you do not have either set up to receive your Daily Cash, it can be applied as statement credit upon request.
Apple Card is issued and Savings accounts are provided by Goldman Sachs Bank USA, Salt Lake City Branch, Member FDIC.
The Apple Cash card is issued by Green Dot Bank, Member FDIC.
Daily Cash is earned on purchases after the transaction posts to your account.
Actual posting times vary by merchant.
Daily Cash is subject to exclusions, and additional details apply.
See the Apple Card Customer Agreement for more information.
If we determine that you have engaged in or plan to engage in abuse or gaming in connection with this offer, you will not be eligible for this offer.
Apple Payments Services LLC, a subsidiary of Apple Inc., is a service provider of Goldman Sachs Bank USA for Apple Card and Savings accounts.
Apple Cash services are provided by Green Dot Bank, Member FDIC.
Apple Payments Services LLC, a subsidiary of Apple Inc., is a service provider of Green Dot Bank for Apple Cash accounts.
nor Apple Payments Services LLC is a bank.
Certain communications about Apple Card can be viewed in another language depending on your device language settings.
If you reside in the U.S.
Virgin Islands, American Samoa, Guam, Northern Mariana Islands, or U.S.
Minor Outlying Islands, please call Goldman Sachs at 877-255-5923 with questions about Apple Card.
Trade‑in values will vary based on the condition, year, and configuration of your eligible trade‑in device.
Not all devices are eligible for credit.
You must be at least the age of majority to be eligible to trade in for credit or for an Apple Gift Card.
Trade‑in value may be applied toward qualifying new device purchase, or added to an Apple Gift Card.
Actual value awarded is based on receipt of a qualifying device matching the description provided when estimate was made.
Sales tax may be assessed on full value of a new device purchase.
In‑store trade‑in requires presentation of a valid photo ID (local law may require saving this information).
Offer may not be available in all stores and may vary between in‑store and online trade‑in.
Some stores may have additional requirements.
Apple or its trade‑in partners reserve the right to refuse, cancel, or limit quantity of any trade‑in transaction for any reason.
More details are available from Apple’s trade-in partner for trade‑in and recycling of eligible devices.
Restrictions and limitations may apply.
A subscription is required for Apple Arcade, Apple Fitness+, Apple Music, and Apple TV.
Features are subject to change.
Some features, applications, and services may not be available in all regions or all languages.
United States Copyright © 2026 Apple Inc.

designIntent.summary: Referencia tecnica confiavel com produto em destaque, grid limpo, transicoes suaves e hierarquia impecavel.
designIntent.hero: Produto como palco, texto como precisao.
designIntent.nonGoal: Nao e DS final do cliente; nao contem fluxo real de formulario.

gradients.name: Blue Aura
gradients.value: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 22%, rgba(0,113,227,.24), transparent 32%), radial-gradient(circle at 78% 72%, rgba(89,168,255,.2), transparent 38%)

semantic.contrastIntent: AA minimum for body text; generated preview overrides --c2 as light surface and --c3 as dark text to avoid low-contrast sections.

contextualUsageRules.text: Usar token semantico com contraste AA.
contextualUsageRules.background: Usar surface/background conforme personalidade do site.

fontFamilies.loading: local when available; fallback stack otherwise

icons.rule: icone nao desloca layout no hover

product-stage.visual: Referencia Apple: tecnico premium / minimal / produto

comparison-card.visual: Referencia Apple: tecnico premium / minimal / produto

support-chip.visual: Referencia Apple: tecnico premium / minimal / produto

spec-table.visual: Referencia Apple: tecnico premium / minimal / produto

motion.parallax: limited scroll response with reduced-motion fallback

accessibility.contrast: AA minimo; overlay obrigatorio sobre imagem

risks: Produto precisa aspecto fixo para nao saltar.
Nao transformar preview em loja final.

rules: Hero full viewport com produto central e copy curta.
Menu minimalista com loja, produto, suporte e comparacao.
CTA azul aparece apenas onde ha decisao.
Motion suave de galeria e scrub.

menuSystem.note: Menu tecnico minimal: discreto, previsivel e sempre legivel.
menuSystem.behavior: overlay flyout, Esc closes, link closes

referenceUsage.purpose: Insumo de confianca tecnica premium. O DS final herda clareza, nao copia Apple.
nonGoals: nao criar DS final do cliente
nao usar padrao generico para todos os sites
differentiationRules: Hero full viewport com produto central e copy curta.
Menu minimalista com loja, produto, suporte e comparacao.
CTA azul aparece apenas onde ha decisao.
Motion suave de galeria e scrub.
referenceUsage.qualityRule: Preview precisa demonstrar personalidade do site extraido, com menu completo, hero, tokens, gradientes, tipo, efeitos, componentes, cards/secoes, story parallax, icones, handoff e motion linkados.

globalTokens.radius: 0-10px conforme referencia; cards ate 8px salvo marcas arredondadas
